overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a distinctive red jacket walking through a rainy downtown urban environment at night. The character navigates wet city streets with modern glass buildings, crosses an intersection, and turns down a sidewalk alongside a stone commercial building.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with overhead pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rain-soaked street toward the intersection ahead

entered.detail: enclosed glass walkway connecting buildings above the street
tall office building with illuminated glass facade
dark stone building with posters and ground-floor shops
decorative dual-globe lamp post with warm lighting
trees with reddish-brown foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet downtown street at night, with rain creating reflections on the asphalt. An overhead glass pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead, while modern glass towers and autumn trees line the left side, and a stone commercial building with an ornate street lamp sits on the right.

events.description: stepping onto the zebra crossing at the intersection
beginning to turn right at the corner of the building

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while moving toward the right side of the street

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crosswalk on wet asphalt
open area where streets meet with visible road markings

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and moves through the intersection, with the overhead bridge now behind. The zebra crossing stripes are prominent on the wet ground as the character approaches the right corner and begins to turn.

events.description: completing the right turn to walk parallel to the building facade

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and walking along the building wall

entered.detail: textured stone wall of the commercial building with rain streaks
dark doorway entrance set back from the sidewalk
illuminated exterior wall-mounted lights above the entrance

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the corner, the character walks along the stone building facade. The recessed entrance with wall-mounted lights becomes prominent on the right, while the intersection and glass tower fall behind. Rain continues to fall heavily, creating a glossy sheen on the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy downtown district that shifts from an open street view to a close-up perspective along a building facade. It begins with the character walking down a wet asphalt street flanked by modern glass towers and autumn trees, moving toward an overhead glass pedestrian bridge. As the character steps onto the zebra-striped crosswalk, the camera follows them through the intersection, leaving the bridge behind while the wet ground reflects the city lights. The scene then shifts as the character turns right at the corner, moving away from the open intersection and toward the textured stone wall of a commercial building. Finally, the camera tracks closely alongside the building's recessed entrance and wall-mounted lights, with heavy rain creating a glossy sheen across the sidewalk.
